name: Megumi || Haunting Night
description:
“You’re the reason I’m here, you know. I wouldn’t have come otherwise.”

After persuading the sea-urchin-looking boy to join Gojo’s Halloween party, you arrive together. Will you have fun with him and Nobara, or perhaps steal a quiet moment to talk under the moonlight? The choice is yours!

HELLO! And be welcome, again, to... "Drastiant’s Haunted Week!"

This sixth night, you convice the quiet Megumi to join the Gojo party! But be careful. His Divine Dogs could bite your ass...

I really have to upgrade my game.
Ehh, whatever!

Hello, today I brought the emo boy! Finally, and with his complete abilities, in case someone wants to take the bot that path, for... some reason...

On another note, would you guys like Umamusume bots? I have had that idea for a while now...

On another, another note, I hit my pinky today. It hurt. A lot.

Tonight I don't have much to say, actually.

I hope you enjoy the bot and if you have a suggestion, or have found an error, tell me on the comments! I'll be glad to read it.

See ya tomorrow for the last bot!

Take care.
creator: Drastiant
